top_signals.title: Ellison Privately Vows to Keep Enlarged Paramount’s Debt in Line
top_signals.summary: It began as a concession in private conversations to assuage wary credit analysts looking at Paramount Skydance Corp.’s blockbuster takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc.: a verbal pledge by the Ellison family to do whatever it takes to slash debt at the combined company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Traders once again prefer dollars over bitcoin. USDT, USDC dominance rises.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Spanish police raid offices of PM Sánchez’s party
top_signals.summary: Latest probe into allegations of judicial interference deepens crisis engulfing prime minister
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kinross bets $3B on Chile gold district growth
top_signals.summary: Kinross advances one of Chile’s biggest proposed gold mines as Atacama cements its global mining hub role.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: TG Jones owner Modella buys Flying Tiger in latest high street swoop
top_signals.summary: Modella Capital has snapped up Flying Tiger Copenhagen in the private equity firm’s latest swoop on the British high street.  The private equity firm sealed the previously trailed deal with Danske Bank and Nordea, the owners of Flying Tiger, on Wednesday. Modella bought Claire’s Accessories before shortly pushing it into administration and its empire of [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: First Phosphate update expands EV battery ingredient fourfold in Quebec
top_signals.summary: The update outlines 6.2 million measured pit-constrained tonnes grading 7.7% phosphate and 198.5 million indicated tonnes at 6%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Steel giant ArcelorMittal fined $72M for polluting rivers in Quebec
top_signals.summary: The conviction relates to various deposits of deleterious substances that took place between May 2014 and May 2022.

top_signals.title: Vizsla secures $10M in Mexico-backed loan for Panuco project
top_signals.summary: Vizsla CEO calls the facility "another important step" in the continued endorsement of its flagship project in the state of Sinaloa.

top_signals.title: US, India establish framework for critical minerals partnership
top_signals.summary: The bilateral agreement follows India's February inclusion into Pax Silica.
